---
title: "Pooling the Poles"
pagetitle: "Pooling the Poles"
page-layout: full
description-meta: "Interactive Polish polling tracker"
open-graph:
  title: "Pooling the Poles"
  description: "Interactive Polish polling tracker"
twitter-card:
  title: "Pooling the Poles"
  description: "Interactive Polish polling tracker"
  card-style: summary_large_image
---

<!-- The Shiny app embedded in a centred, capped-width frame (.embed-frame in
     styles.css), matching the Calepin site's pages/pooling-the-poles.typ. -->
<iframe src="https://ben-stanley.shinyapps.io/polish-polls/"
        class="embed-frame"
        title="Pooling the Poles — interactive Polish polling tracker"
        loading="lazy"></iframe>
